rulings.Case Title: WINFIELD INTERNATIONAL INC. VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 1. RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's AMENDED DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Petitioner's claims are barred by Statute of Limitations and Res Judicata. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 2. PETITIONER CHINESE HOSPITAL ASSOCIATION's Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien GRANTED. No opposition filed. Mechanics lien shall be released. Petitioner shall recover attorney's fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 11, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT TIANYI ZHAO's MOTION To Quash Deposition Subpoena Transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on October 11, 2017 with other pending motion. = (501/REQ)
